steps.title: Use the time-period contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts Pleistocene human-ancestor fossils in Japan with fossils at Mistaken Point that document the earliest multicellular organisms. That contrast indicates Mistaken Point preserves evidence from a much older stage of evolutionary history.

steps.title: Reject invented comparisons
steps.content: Choice A invents a comparison of fossil number and species variety. Choice B wrongly makes the evidence about early humans. Choice C overstates the site's value beyond what the passage says. The remaining choice reflects the older time period. The answer is D.
